_meta.title: MvC2 Oracle inspector label manifest
_meta.edit_safety_rule: editable=false is a HARD BLOCK. The engine-owned pointer cluster +0x154..+0x184 and EVERY pointer must never be written into a live SH4: a stale current_cell_data (+0x154) mis-indexes the bank12 cell-processor jump table -> jmp into non-code -> illegal-instruction (expEvn=0x180). The documented state-injection dead-end.
_meta.type_legend: u8/s8/u16/s16/u32 ints; f32 float; ptr 4-byte pointer (never editable); flags bitfield; enum has value->label map.

fields.name: active
fields.note: slot active flag (pl_mem active@0x00).

fields.name: character_id
fields.note: roster char id == PLxx hex == S_PLxx index. S_PL01=Zangief NOT Ryu.

fields.name: pl_palid_match
fields.note: color/palette index selected in-match (live skin/tint). mirror @+0x52D.

fields.name: pos_x
fields.note: world X (pl_mem x_pos). Feeds facing setter loc_8c0d97ee + world->screen transform.

fields.name: pos_y
fields.note: world Y (pl_mem y_pos).

fields.name: char_pal_effect
fields.note: super-glow / hit-flash palette effect word.

fields.name: x_sprite_scale
fields.note: per-char sprite scale X (y@+0x54, z@+0x58).

fields.name: y_sprite_scale
fields.note: per-char sprite scale Y.

fields.name: z_sprite_scale
fields.note: per-char sprite scale Z.

fields.name: screen_x
fields.note: post-transform screen X, WRITTEN every frame by loc_8c03093c -> editing overwritten next frame.

fields.name: screen_y
fields.note: post-transform screen Y, engine-recomputed each frame.

fields.name: hitbox_scale_x
fields.note: hitbox/render scale X; body walker loc_8c0344d4 final screen = node+0xE0 + pen*scale@0xEC.

fields.name: hitbox_scale_y
fields.note: hitbox/render scale Y.

fields.name: facing
fields.note: facing COPY (pl_mem xflip_copy_2). WRITTEN per-frame by setter loc_8c0d97ee = (opp.pos_x>self.pos_x)?1:0 -> external write overwritten. Authoritative source = xflip@+0x1D2.

fields.name: xflip_copy
fields.note: per-frame facing copy; same semantics as facing.

fields.name: anim_timer
fields.note: frame_count / per-frame countdown decremented by the engine. Writing fights the anim clock.

fields.name: sprite_id
fields.note: stable per-char BODY render key (mask &0x7FFF) -- THE renderer input; cell index into Dat_GFX2; on the GSTA wire. Anim engine reasserts it from the active cell each frame.

fields.name: anim_flags
fields.note: per-frame flags from cell+0x10: 0x20 no-cancel, 0x40 recovery, 0x80 proximity-block.

fields.name: unk_01d0
fields.note: DISPUTED width: marvelous2 byte (which move to play) vs CLAUDE.md u16. Trust byte. NOT on sprite-selection critical path.

fields.name: xflip
fields.note: AUTHORITATIVE facing/x-mirror byte (pl_mem xflip). +0x110/+0x130 are copies.

fields.name: stance
fields.note: posture.

fields.name: current_cell_data
fields.note: ENGINE ptr to current 20-byte anim cell; deref'd every frame. HARD BLOCK -- stale value mis-indexes bank12 jump table -> expEvn=0x180. Root of the state-injection dead-end.

fields.name: anim_group
fields.note: ENGINE current animation group/anim id; recomputed per frame.

fields.name: Dat_GFX1
fields.note: ENGINE per-char GFX1 part-table base (tile metadata). HARD BLOCK pointer.

fields.name: Dat_GFX2
fields.note: ENGINE per-char GFX2 cell table; cell=GFX2+*(u32)(GFX2+(sid&0x7FFF)*4). HARD BLOCK pointer.

fields.name: Dat_Pal
fields.note: ENGINE per-char live palette ptr (ARGB4444). HARD BLOCK pointer.

fields.name: animations
fields.note: ENGINE base of per-char anim/cell keyframe table. HARD BLOCK pointer.

fields.name: hitbox_pattern_table
fields.note: ENGINE hitbox pattern table ptr. HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: hitbox_data
fields.note: ENGINE hitbox data ptr. HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: attack_data
fields.note: ENGINE attack data table ptr (anotak DAT_atk). HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: Sprite_Extras
fields.note: ENGINE EXTRAS/OAM sprite-assembly record ptr (8-byte records). HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: Dat_FilePointer
fields.note: ENGINE base file ptr for the loaded PLxx_DAT. HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: FAC_ptr
fields.note: ENGINE FAC (face/portrait) file ptr. HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: health
fields.note: current health (pl_mem health@0x420).

fields.name: red_health
fields.note: recoverable/red health (pl_mem health2@0x424).

fields.name: palette
fields.note: palette/pal_id mirror. Live select uses pl_palid_match@+0x025.

fields.name: match_sub_state
fields.note: match sub-state. True state machine = Match_Tracker@0x8C2895F0.

fields.name: in_match
fields.note: in-match flag; gates scene.

fields.name: round_counter
fields.note: round counter.

fields.name: game_timer
fields.note: match countdown timer.

fields.name: stage_id
fields.note: current stage id; drives client-side stage render.

fields.name: p1_meter_fill
fields.note: P1 super-meter fill.

fields.name: p1_combo
fields.note: P1 combo counter.

fields.name: Match_Tracker
fields.note: match-state machine; best scene-gating signal.

fields.name: slot_table_count
fields.note: render slot-table (count array), stride 0x180 -- THE draw list. Engine-walked; do not hand-edit.

fields.name: Camera_Z_Position
fields.note: camera Z / zoom (default 812.357). Lives in page 616, not 649.

fields.name: slot_table_ptrs
fields.note: inner x4 pointer array for the slot table. HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: frame_counter
fields.note: global frame counter; .mcrec alignment. Editing desyncs the engine clock.

pool_node.note: Object-pool node. Base 0x8C26AA54, stride 0x1D0, 256 nodes. Offsets relative to node base.

fields.name: obj_category
fields.note: object category/type; selects constructor; layer hint.

fields.name: obj_next
fields.note: active-list next ptr. HARD BLOCK -- editing corrupts the pool walk.

fields.name: obj_prev
fields.note: active-list prev ptr. HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: obj_update_fn
fields.note: per-frame update fn ptr. HARD BLOCK -- jumped to as code.

fields.name: obj_world_x
fields.note: object world X.

fields.name: obj_world_y
fields.note: object world Y.

fields.name: obj_owner
fields.note: OWNER player-struct ptr (copy @+0x84); maps to char_id->atlas/palette. HARD BLOCK.

fields.name: obj_screen_x
fields.note: RESOLVED screen X written by loc_8c03093c (NOT +0xC8); engine-recomputed.

fields.name: obj_screen_y
fields.note: RESOLVED screen Y; engine-recomputed.

fields.name: obj_cull
fields.note: cull/enable byte (skip render if !=0). NOT a sprite_id.

fields.name: obj_sprite_id
fields.note: object sprite_id (what readAllDrawn reads). sid is here @+0x144, NOT @+0x12C.
